title: HL Submersible LED Light,Warm White Small LED Light,100 Hours Waterproof Flameless Led Lights Battery Powered for Wedding Home Vase Festival Party Decoration 12pcs(Built-in 24 Batteries)
features: 【BATTERY POWERED】Mini submersible led light is Extra-Long Burn Time, Provide approximately 100 hours of continuous bright light, it will not die completely until it reaches approximately 120 hours of burn time. The light will just become dimmer between the 100-120 hours. This makes these lights the longest burning submersible tea lights on the market today (can burn almost 5 consecutive days.)

【CUTE ATMOSPHERE】The Submersible Led Lights Built-in spotlight mirror, makes this mini led lights give off a more intense glow.Perfect for event, party, lighting up vases and any water filled table centerpiece. It can create a great atmosphere indoors and outdoors when you are partying with your family or friends.

【WIDE APPLICATION】LED Decorative lights great for the centerpieces, vase, ponds, swimming pools, fish tanks, aquariums, ice buckets and so on.Definitely atmosphere lights on wedding, party, Valentine's Day and other events. With a hanging hook on the bottom, you can use it for lantern lighting as well.

【IP68 WATERPROOF】The led underwater lights is IP68 waterproof design, it could be waterproof by screwing the lights tightly.Perfect Design waterproof. After twist the lids tightly,the O-ring will involved in the reserved gap. NO LEAK RISK.

【Packaging & Operation】HL Submersible LED lights the attractive packaging makes this a great gift item. you can reuse these tea lights as many times as you wish. LED bulbs are known to be really long lasting. Each light can easily be operated by twisting them on/off.
description: Product Description Can be Hung, Decorated, and Used in Water LED Decorative Lights Led Submersible Tea Lights add a decorative touch to your wedding centerpieces, party décor, birthday flower vases, floral arrangements, fish tanks, ponds and pools. These soft Warm white LED Tea lights create a warm ambiance without the smoke, wax or mess to clean. A Commendable Life These waterproof tea lights by HL are made of high quality acrylic which seals the battery and LED bulb from becoming wet, thus making this light completely waterproof. These have been tested in large bodies of water and will remain lit even when submerged for a long period of time. Mini Submersible Led Lights Lightweight and compact, it can be glued, hung, and submerged in water for use. Built-in 24 Batteries Use insulating sheets for long-term storage, use in romantic holiday parties. HL Waterproof Tea Lights Suitable for any scene and event, including light decoration in the water. Happiness Light Decorative lights for festivals, weddings, party, vase, pond, pool, aquarium, bathtub, spa. Come With CR2032 Batteries Which Have 100+ Hours Twist it counter-clockwise Press down on teh battery Take out the insulation sheet Tighten it clockwise Super Bright Waterproof LED Lights That Can Be Immersed in Water
